channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Physical AI’s $50 trillion opportunity requires long-term conviction, but the payoff is huge
item.description: Long capex cycles, safety constraints, and brownfield realities mean the biggest returns will go to companies that invest now and play the long game.

item.title: AI is about to disrupt millions of jobs. A century ago, America’s answer was to build a new high school
item.description: AI is rewriting the rules of work. America's high schools are still teaching the old ones.

item.title: Iran strikes 85 U.S. military sites in the Gulf, sparking a global selloff in stocks and a spike in the price of oil
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: Nomagic’s new AI lab, led by former Google DeepMind researcher, reports early success with ‘AI brain’ for warehouse robots
item.description: Nomagic says its new 'vision-language-action' model halved robot errors requiring human intervention at logistics clients.
